mainEntity.name: Deadline to dispute permanent impairment rating in Farmington?
mainEntity.text: Deadline to dispute permanent impairment rating in Farmington?

acceptedAnswer.text: 20 days to object rating; request re-exam within 180 days of MMI[4].

suggestedAnswer.text: Farmington/Davis County: ALJ reviews disputes. Independent medical exam key. Ratings determine lifelong payments—fight lowballs[3][4].

name: Dispute Impairment Rating Farmington UT
